spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) for containers, dense control-room grids (gap-4) for leaderboards

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border border-border, no shadow
surface_strategies.interactive: Neumorphic subtle lift on hover: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-transform

components.tables: Dense, crisp lines, border-b only, numbers aligned right
components.buttons: Flat, primary green (#1B3C35), crisp text. Hover state explicitly defined
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but with 1px border-border, bg-surface, rounded-md

hero_background.description: Aerial view of a golf course hole with a pond

golf_club_close.description: Golf club and ball close up

instructions_to_main_agent: Use tailwind strictly according to the typography and color scale defined.
Implement a responsive navigation bar using the Crystal Glass surface strategy.
Ensure the leaderboard uses accessible colors (Terracotta for under-par, Slate for over-par, Moss for even-par). PGA styling emphasizes these numeric states clearly.
For Shadcn components, override the Vercel-look by setting border radiuses to match the organic feel (rounded-lg or rounded-xl) and using the specified color palette.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all iconography.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
